name: Denied benefits after surgery for work comp, can I get lawyer paid from settlement?

mainEntity.name: Denied benefits after surgery for work comp, can I get lawyer paid from settlement?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, contingency fees typical (10-20%); no win, no fee.[2] Key factors: Appeal first.[1] Fees court-approved.[2] Increases net recovery.[2] Worth it for fights.[1]
